jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Rivigo
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
